snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 2 | Teacher Sahi Hona Chahiye
snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn‚Äôt have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here‚Äôs to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha

DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha‚Äôs father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 ‚Äď Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚ÄĚ Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel‚Äôs Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he‚Äôs going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they‚Äôve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom‚Äôs forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe‚ÄĒfrom London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚ÄĚ Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar¬ģ winner Helen Mirren and Oscar¬ģ winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom‚Äôs past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

snippet.title: Major Teaser | Telugu | Adivi Sesh | Sobhita | Saiee Manjrekar | Mahesh Babu | Sashi Tikka
snippet.description:
#Major Telugu Teaser. Major, an Indian film, releasing in Telugu, Hindi and Malayalam is produced by Sony Pictures Films India in association with Mahesh Babu's GMB Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and A+S Movies. It is directed by acclaimed Telugu director Sashi Kiran Tikka and features Adivi Sesh, Sobhita Dhulipala and Saiee Manjrekar. 

‚ÄėThe film speaks about the way he lived, not about the way he lost his life.‚Äô 

#MajorTeaser #MajorTheFilm #AdiviSesh #MaheshBabu

Based on the life of real-life Hero Major Sandeep Unnikrishnan, Major, the film, aims to show how this valiant soldier saved the lives of numerous hostages before being martyred by the terrorists who wreaked havoc in the Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai, India on the 26th of November, 2008.

Starring: Adivi Sesh, Saiee Manjrekar, Sobhita Dhulipala, Prakash Raj, Revathi, Murali Sharma
Produced by: Sony Pictures Films India, GMB Entertainment, and A+S Movies
Directed by: Sashi Kiran Tikka
Story and Screenplay: Adivi Sesh 
Script Guidance and Telugu DIalogue: Abburi Ravi 
Cinematography: Vamsi Patchipulusu
Music: Sri Charan Pakala
Editing: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi &  Kodati Pavan Kalyan
Lyrics: Ramajogayya Sastry (Telugu), Ritesh Rajwada (Hindi)
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla
Action Choreography: Sunil Rodrigues 
Additional Action Choreography: Naba-Subbu
Hindi Dialogue: Akshat Ajay Sharma
Malayalam Dialogue: Yedhu-Abhijith M
Costume Designer : Rekha Boggarapu
Executive Producer: Rajiv Bharadwaj
Direction Team: Vinay Kumar Sirigineedi, Narendra Gautam Varma, Dinesh Jajula, Anurag Mudiganti, Balu Manoj D
DI, VFX and Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Technical Head: CV Rao
Colorist: Vishnu Vardhan K
VFX Supervisor: Venkateshwar Allagadda
Teaser Mix and Master : S. Anant Srikar
Sound Mix: Krishnaraj Arumugam
Sound Design: Ethi Raaj
P.R.O. : Vamsi-Shekar(Telugu), Sanchita Trivedi(Hindi), Athira Diljith(Malayalam)
Publicity Designs : Anil-Bhanu
Digital Agency: First Show(Telugu), White Rivers Media(Hindi)

Please join the microsite to share your tribute: https://majorthemovie.sonypicturesindia.com

Bigg Boss Malayalam Season 3 made its premiere on February 14. With Mohanlal as the host, the 14 contestants include various artists from different fields. The host also revealed that the contestants will go through two-week mandatory quarantine before entering the house. They will be allowed to enter only after they test negative for coronavirus.

The contestants are actor Nobby Marcose, Psychologist Dimple Bhal, RJ Firoz who is also known as 'Kidilam' Firoz, Tv actor Manikuttan, Powerlifting champion and medical student Majiziya Bhanu, DJ Soorya J Meno, Musician A Lekshmi Jayan, Model Sai Vishnu, TV actor Anoop Krishnan, Debater Adoney T John, 'D4' dance winner and youngest contestant Muhammed Ramzan, model and singer Rithu Manthra, Yoga instructor Sandhya Manoj, and dubbing artist Bhagyalakshmi.

Bigg Boss Malayalam Season 3 made its premiere on February 14. With Mohanlal as the host, the 14 contestants include various artists from different fields. The host also revealed that the contestants will go through two-week mandatory quarantine before entering the house. They will be allowed to enter only after they test negative for coronavirus.

The contestants are actor Nobby Marcose, Psychologist Dimple Bhal, RJ Firoz who is also known as 'Kidilam' Firoz, Tv actor Manikuttan, Powerlifting champion and medical student Majiziya Bhanu, DJ Soorya J Meno, Musician A Lekshmi Jayan, Model Sai Vishnu, TV actor Anoop Krishnan, Debater Adoney T John, 'D4' dance winner and youngest contestant Muhammed Ramzan, model and singer Rithu Manthra, Yoga instructor Sandhya Manoj, and dubbing artist Bhagyalakshmi.

snippet.title: F9 - Official Trailer 2
snippet.description:
F9
Fast is back June 25.
http://www.thefastsaga.com/

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel‚Äôs Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he‚Äôs going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they‚Äôve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom‚Äôs forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe‚ÄĒfrom London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚ÄĚ Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar¬ģ winner Helen Mirren and Oscar¬ģ winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom‚Äôs past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.  www.thefastsaga.com

snippet.title: LIVE-CLASS 10TH BOARD EXAMS CANCELLED | HOW YOU WILL GET MARKS? | CBSE Latest News
snippet.description:
Hey!

CBSE has announced class 10th board exams will be cancelled and students will be promoted on the basis of objective criterion. In this pandemic when CBSE students have faced many challenges. First, they study online and couldn't get proper support from schools, then their exam gets postponed. But students were so much hardworking that they didn't stop and keep learning and prepared for their exams. But now due to the rise in corona cases, CBSE Board has decided to cancel CBSE class 10th exams this year. 

Comment below on what you feel about it. 

Team Dear Sir

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

snippet.title: Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
snippet.description:
Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
------------------------------------
Connect with HafizTahirQadri: ūüĎČ http://bit.ly/HafizTahirQadri‚Äč
Record Label: *Hafiz Tahir Qadri * 
Credits:-
------------------------------------
Naatkhuwan : Hafiz Tahir Qadri, Hafiz Ahsan Qadri, Hanzal Qadri and Hamza Qadri
Audio: Rao Wassay (RWDS)
Composition :Hafiz Tahir Qadri 
Poet: Allama Nisar Ali Ujagar
DOP: Syed Bilal Sani 
Edit & Post: Taha Qadri
------------------------------------------------



Lyrics
======


Aya ALLAH ka mehman 
Aya he Maah e Ramzan 
Le kar hathon mei Quraan
Aya he maah e ramzan 

Rahmat e Ramzan Rahmat e Ramzan 
Rahmat e Ramzan
Rahmat e Ramzan

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he 

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga
Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga

Dekho flak pe chand chamka maah e ramzaa aya 
Nikhra nikhra har ek chehra maah e ramzaa aya

Pure maheenay roze rakhna acha lagta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Bacho roza rakhna he qurb khuda ka paana he 
Raazi hota he REHMAAN aya he maah e ramzan 

Ramzaa mei momin k muqaddar roshan lagte hein
Masjid k mehraab o mimbar roshan lagte hein

Masjid mei logon ka barhna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Ramzan k roze rakhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rab ki Rahmat ghar ghar utri aya he mehmaan 

mazy mazy ki khushbu pheli Saje hein dastar khuwan

Iftaari mei mil kar khana acha lgta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Gunbad e khazra k saye mei ham sab bethe houn
Dastar khuwan saja ho lab par un ki naatain houn 

Taiba mei Iftaari karna Acha lagta he he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Nafraton ko chor k tote dilon ko jour k maah e ramzaa ki barkat se ek banna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Rishwat lena or dena soud pe Business q karna maah e ramzaa ki barkat s bachte rehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Gheebat or chughal khori neiki se he ghaddari 
Maah e ramzaa ki barkat se sach hi kehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Ashra e rahmat ashra e bakhshish naar se azaadi 
Maang ujagar apni
bakhshish ban ja faryaadi 

Rab se duaen krte rehna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

"Rahmat e ramzaan"
------------------------------------------------
Official Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/HafizTahirQadri/


#MujhkoRamzanKaMahina‚Äč #HafizTahirQadri‚Äč #RamzanSpecialNasheed‚Äč #Prophet‚Äč #Quran‚Äč #nasheed‚Äč #ramadan2021‚Äč #arabic‚Äč #arabicnasheed‚Äč #naat‚Äč #naatcream‚Äč #vocals‚Äč #islamicnasheed‚Äč #muslims‚Äč #ramzan‚Äč #ramzan2021‚Äč #rehmateramzan‚Äč #iftar‚Äč #sehri‚Äč #muslimworld

Credits:
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal
Music Director: Navin-Manish
Lyrics: Traditional
Edit & Gfx : Prem Graphics PG
Music Label: Music Nova

Lyrics:
Jai Jai Durge Maa
Jai Jai Ambe Maa
Jai Jai Durge Maa
Jai Jai Ambe Maa

Namo Namo Durge Sukh Karni
Namo Namo Ambe Dukh Harni
Nirakar Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tihun Lok Phaili Ujiyari

Shashi Lalaat Mukh Maha Vishala
Netra Lal Bhrikouti Vikarala
Roop Maatu Ko Adhik Suhave
Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Paave
Tum Sansar Shakti Ley Keena
Palan Hetu Anna Dhan Deena
Annapoorna Hui Jag Paala
Tumhi Aadi Sundari Bala

Pralayakal Sab Nashaan Haari
Tum Gouri Shiv Shankar Pyari
Shiv Yogi Tumhare Gun Gaavein
Brahma Vishnu Tumhein Nit Dhyaave
Roop Saraswati Ko Tum Dhara
De Subuddhi Rishi Munina Ubara
Dhara Roop Narsimha Ko Amba
Pragat Bhayi Phaad Kar Khamba

Raksha Kari Prahlad Bachayo
Hiranyaykush Ko Swarg Pathayo
Lakshmi Roop Dharo Jag Mahin
Shree Narayan Anga Samahin

Ksheer Sindhu Mein Karat Vilaasa
Daya Sindhu Deejey Mann Aasa
Hingalaja Mein Tumhi Bhawani
Mahima Amit Na Jaat Bakhani

Matangi Dhoomawati Mata
Bhuvaneshwari Bagala Sukhdata
Shree Bhairav Tara Jag Tarini
Chhinna Bhala Bhava Dukh Nivarini
Kehari Vahan Sohe Bhawani
Laangur Veer Chalat Agavani
Kar Mein Khappar Khadaga Virajay
Jako Dekh Kaal Darr Bhajey

Sohe Astra Aur Trishula
Jate Uthata Shatru Hiya Shoola

Nagkoti Mein Toumhi Virajat
Tihoun Lok Mein Danka Baajat
Shumbh Nishumbh Daanav Tum Maare
Rakta Beej Shankhana Sanghaare
Mahishasur Nrip Ati Abhimani
Jehi Agh Bhar Mahi Akulaani

Roop Karaal Kali Ka Dhara
Sena Sahita Tum Tihin Samhara
Pidh Pari Santana Par Jab Jab
Bhayi Sahay Maat Tum Tab Tab
Amarpuri Auro Sab Lokaa
Tab Mahima Sab Rahey Ashoka
Jwala Mein Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tumhein Sada Poojey Nar Nari

Prem Bhakti Se Jo Jas Gaave
Dukh Daridra Nikat Nahin Aave
Dhyave Jo Nar Man Layi
Janma Maran Tako Chhouti Jaayi
Jogi Sur Muni Kahat Pukaari
Yog Nahi Bina Shakti Tumhari
Shankar Acharaj Tap Kinho
Kaamaru Krodh Jeet Sab Leenho

Nishdin Dhyan Dharo Shankar Ko
Kaahu Kaal Nahin Sumiro Tumko
Shakti Roop Ko Maram Na Paayo
Shakti Gayi Tab Mann Pachitayo
Sharnagat Huyi Kiriti Bakhai
Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe Bhawani

Bhayi Prasanna Aadi Jagadamba
Dayi Shakti Nahin Keen Vilamba

Maukon Maatu Kashta Ati Ghero
Tum Bin Kaun Hare Dukh Mero
Asha Trishna Nipat Satave
Ripu Murakh Mohi Ati Darpave
Shatru Nash Keejai Maharani
Soumiron Ikchit Tumhein Bhawani
Karo Kripa Hey Maatu Dayala
Riddhi Siddhi Dey Karahou Nihaala

Jab Lagi Jiyoun Daya Phal Paun
Tumharo Jas Mein Sada Sunaun
Durga Chalisa Jo Koi Gaavey
Sab Sukh Bhog Parampad Paave

Devidas Sharan Neej Jaani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani

Sharanagat Raksha Kare
Bhakt Rahe Nishank
Me Aaya Teri Sharan Mein
Matu Leejiye Ank

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√ļl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: ŗģįŗģĺŗģú ŗģĶŗģŅŗģįŗĮĀŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ŗĮĀ - 76 Items in One Leaf for ‚āĻ700 at Raja Bhogam | Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#RajaBhogam #UnlimitedFeast #irfansview 

Raja Bhogam is a restaurant which was known as Carnival, they have changed their name to most famous feast of them. Now they give 76 items in a huge banana leaf for rupees 700, all the items which is served is unlimited. They serve varieties of items in Veg and Non-Veg too. From starters to dessert they are just giving varieties. The taste of each dish was really amazing. It was really a king feast, and I really enjoyed the feast.

LOCATION: https://g.page/rajabhogam?share

Now they give 76 items in a huge banana leaf for rupees 700, all the items which is served is unlimited. They serve varieties of items in Veg and Non-Veg too. From starters to dessert they are just giving varieties. The taste of each dish was really amazing. It was really a king feast, and I really enjoyed the feast.

egg -1

oil for frying

Episode 3144: Popatlal Meets Pooja 
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal and Pooja meet for the first time. Pooja is quiet impressed by Popatlal and his personality but in between pooja receives a call from her relatives  and she has to leave but she promises Popatlal that she will meet him at 5 o clock to confess her feelings to know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Maadappa - Orchestra, Mysuru! - Poornachandra | Dhananjaya| Raghu Dixit | Naveen Sajju |Sunil Mysuru
snippet.description:
Every being has music within. Every breath has a tune. Every step has a rhythm. This whole world manifests its beauty according to Lord Maadappa's melody! We all have music hidden inside us. We all reside in that divine music. By intently listening to our own heart's voice, we can see Lord Maadappa's mystic magic in all of us and in everything around us. 'Maadappa' is a song that celebrates the faith that music exists in every atom in the universe! 'Orchestra, Mysuru!', is the story of an underdog talent, who discovers music within himself!

localized.title: Maadappa - Orchestra, Mysuru! - Poornachandra | Dhananjaya| Raghu Dixit | Naveen Sajju |Sunil Mysuru
localized.description:
Every being has music within. Every breath has a tune. Every step has a rhythm. This whole world manifests its beauty according to Lord Maadappa's melody! We all have music hidden inside us. We all reside in that divine music. By intently listening to our own heart's voice, we can see Lord Maadappa's mystic magic in all of us and in everything around us. 'Maadappa' is a song that celebrates the faith that music exists in every atom in the universe! 'Orchestra, Mysuru!', is the story of an underdog talent, who discovers music within himself!

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: The Real You - Sandeep Maheshwari
snippet.description:
Sandeep Maheshwari is a name among millions who struggled, failed and surged ahead in search of success, happiness and contentment. Just like any middle class guy, he too had a bunch of unclear dreams and a blurred vision of his goals in life. All he had was an undying learning attitude to hold on to. Rowing through ups and downs, it was time that taught him the true meaning of his life.

To know more, log on to www.sandeepmaheshwari.com
Connect with him at Facebook.com/SandeepMaheshwariPage
Watch his inspirational videos at Youtube.com/SandeepSeminars
Watch his videos on spirituality at Youtube.com/SandeepMaheshwariSpirituality

snippet.title: MOVING HOUSES || House tour || What's up with us - Leo&Fam
snippet.description:
Hey everybody,

Sorry that it took this long to upload a video here. 
Honestly, life's been chaotic!!! We are doing great right now and hope you guys are staying safe and well too... You all know we shifted houses recently but we realise you didnt get what the hell and heaven has happened and why we were shifting all of a sudden!? A lot of you wanted a house tour and some of you just wanted to know what's been up at our end. I really hope this video gives all the answers :)

Love,
Leo&Fam!

snippet.description:
AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA - Daaru Ki Peti | ŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•Ā ŗ§ēŗ§Ņ ŗ§™ŗ•áŗ§üŗ•Ä | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Full Video | Superhit Haryanvi Songs | Tips Haryanvi 

Tips Haryanvi presents Official video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 #DaaruKiPeti, by #AmitSainiRohtakiya Featuring #ShailSingh. The song is written by #KPKundu & #BintuPabra; Composed by #GRMusic. 

Stay updated with latest videos from Tips Haryanvi, Subscribe on below link. https://bit.ly/TipsHaryanviChannel

Available On:
JioSaavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/daaru-ki-peti/CBamTMk5E-E_
Amazon: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091M5681N
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJMoWsnP/
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/daaru-ki-peti-single/1561347653

Song Credits:-
Staring: Amit Saini Rohtakiya & Shail Singh
Singer: Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Lyrics: K P Kundu & Bintu Pabra
Music: G R Music
DOP: Munish Sharma
Edit/DI: Rom Yo Rider
Director: Jeetu G
Promotion By: Navi Baadliwal

Song Lyrics:

Tane Ese Mile Nye Diladaar Darling
Hoge Change Dino Din Kirdaar Darling
Kutya Main Bi Hove Bafadaari Aale Gunn 
Tere Jakhma Ne Sui Taagya Gel Sigya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re
¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬† 
Meri Fenk Gi Tu Gaani Rani Haar Dekhke
Mera Tvs Chodya Kaali Thaar Dekhte
Kde Maar Khagya Tere Pyaar Main Jakon
Main To Mess Bi Leu Tha Motti Dhaar Dekhke
Tu Soya Kardi Main Rooj Maar Ke 
Eab Sochdi Hogi Saala Fer Jigya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re
¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬†¬† 
Teri Fhotuyan Pe Delli Chora Haar Taange Se
Gaal Taagya Main Namak Nimbu Bhaar Tange Se
Pabre Kinale Main Meri Margi Padet 
Saade 16 Sun Dekedaar Mange Se
Kp Bintu Gaanya Te Chlave Rotti Pani 
Tere Dokhya Pe Yo Gaana Su Fer Likhya Re
Meri Daru Aali Petiyan Ka Karjya Hisaab 
Teri Yaadyan Main Yo Chora Pura Theka Pigya Re

snippet.description:

#ColorsTV #Shakti

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ĺ  ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§•ŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§öŗ§≤ŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą ŗ§ēŗ§Ņ ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ķŗ•Ä ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ•Ćŗ§® ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§ ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ķŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Įŗ§Ļ ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§ģ ŗ§ēŗ•ąŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ? ŗ§áŗ§ł ŗ§Ķŗ•Äŗ§°ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§įŗ§§ŗ•Ä, ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§ģŗ§āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§į, ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§ēŗ§Ķŗ§ö ‚Äč‚Äčŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§∂ŗ•ąŗ§≤ŗ§™ŗ•Āŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•čŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ģ ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§Ėŗ§ĺŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§óŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ•§

Om Shan Shailaputri Devyai Namah. First of all, best wishes for Navratri 2020 to all of you. During the 9 days of holy festival of Navratri, nine forms of Goddess Durga are worshiped and each day is dedicated to an incarnation of Goddess Mother. As we all know, there are different forms of Goddess. Today is the first of the auspicious nine days of Navratri which is dedicated to Goddess Shailaputri.
Shailaputri, daughter of the mountains, is a avatar of the goddess, Durga. She is one of the first Navadurga venerated during the first day of Navratri. She is also known as Sati, Bhavani, Parvati or Hemavati.

Shailaputri mata ( #shailputrimata ) is the absolute form of Mother Nature. Mata Shailputri is born from a rock or a mountain, so worshiping her brings stability in life. With proper worship of Mata Shailputri, marital life remains happy and happiness comes to your family. Their archana awakens the muladhara chakra, which results in the development of vitality and enthusiasm in life. At the same time, on the first day of Navratri, by worshiping mother Shailaputri, all kinds of defects associated with the moon are removed and good fortune is achieved.  We should listen #navratrikatha of maa Shailputri  on day 1 of navratri for her blessings.
 Maa Shailputri ki katha shows who is devi shailputri. How devi got this name of Shailputri ? This video also shows Shailputri Aarti, shailputri mantra , shailputri kavach, and shailputri stotram.

Om Shan Shailaputri Devyai Namah. First of all, best wishes for Navratri 2020 to all of you. During the 9 days of holy festival of Navratri, nine forms of Goddess Durga are worshiped and each day is dedicated to an incarnation of Goddess Mother. As we all know, there are different forms of Goddess. Today is the first of the auspicious nine days of Navratri which is dedicated to Goddess Shailaputri.
Shailaputri, daughter of the mountains, is a avatar of the goddess, Durga. She is one of the first Navadurga venerated during the first day of Navratri. She is also known as Sati, Bhavani, Parvati or Hemavati.

Shailaputri mata ( #shailputrimata ) is the absolute form of Mother Nature. Mata Shailputri is born from a rock or a mountain, so worshiping her brings stability in life. With proper worship of Mata Shailputri, marital life remains happy and happiness comes to your family. Their archana awakens the muladhara chakra, which results in the development of vitality and enthusiasm in life. At the same time, on the first day of Navratri, by worshiping mother Shailaputri, all kinds of defects associated with the moon are removed and good fortune is achieved.  We should listen #navratrikatha of maa Shailputri  on day 1 of navratri for her blessings.
 Maa Shailputri ki katha shows who is devi shailputri. How devi got this name of Shailputri ? This video also shows Shailputri Aarti, shailputri mantra , shailputri kavach, and shailputri stotram.

Lyrics:

Jado koi hiqq naal laau sohniye,
Tenu pakka cheta  mera aau sohniye,
Gore gall nu jo la k ditte chawa na tweet,
Koi zulfa hta k galo laau sohniye,
Mera pau ga plekha baar baar,
 
Dassi j koi kare ni tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar,
 
 
Mere baare ta zaroori ohnu dasse gi,
Man rovega tera te utto hasse gi,
Ohne tenu khaas kade chauna nai,
Vaada tere naal ma v mud auna nai,
Chatt labb jande ajj kall yaar,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , Tenu mere wangu sohniye pyaar 
 
 
Kheda jazbaata naal aam jaiya galla ne,
Khore tenu mere lai bnaya nai c allah ne,
Zind lekhe laayi bhora kitta na lihaaj,
Haye Rakhi na rkaane hun dhillon kolo aas,
Tera sarda asi v la ge saar ,
 
 
Dassi j koi kare ni , tenu mere vangu sohniye pyaar.

snippet.description:
Sanskaar sees Patali Devi perform strange rituals and assumes her to be a witch. Sujata blames Swara for the attack on Ragini. Ragini tells everyone that Swara is her kidnapper.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.description:
When the goons barge into Virat's house in search of Heer, Virat swears to protect Heer at any cost and tries to fend them off. Will Virat succeed in his attempt?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:

snippet.description:

OH SANAM MERE HUMDUM TU KITNA PYARA HAI

RAB ka bhi ye ishara hai
